scripts.check: bun run type-check && bun run lint && bun run spellcheck && bun test --pass-with-no-tests
scripts.ssg:build:serve: cd src/apps/ssg && bun build serve.ts --outdir ../../../build/ssg/serve --target=node --external vite
scripts.ssg:build: bun run ssg:build:client && bun run ssg:build:server && bun run ssg:build:serve
scripts.ssg:generate:dev: cd src/apps/ssg && bun run generate-ssg.ts dev
scripts.ssg:generate:prod: cd src/apps/ssg && bun run generate-ssg.ts prod
scripts.ssg:build-and-generate:dev: bun run ssg:build && bun run ssg:generate:dev
scripts.ssg:build-and-generate:prod: bun run ssg:build && bun run ssg:generate:prod
scripts.ssg:serve:dev: cd src/apps/ssg && bun run serve.ts dev
scripts.ssg:serve:prod: cd src/apps/ssg && bun run serve.ts prod
scripts.ssg:build-generate-serve:dev: bun run ssg:build-and-generate:dev && bun run ssg:serve:built:dev
scripts.ssg:build-generate-serve:prod: bun run ssg:build-and-generate:prod && bun run ssg:serve:built:prod
scripts.ssr:build:serve: cd src/apps/ssr && bun build serve-built.ts --outdir ../../../build/ssr/serve --target=node --external vite --define 'IS_BUILT=true'
scripts.ssr:build: bun run generate:build-info && bun run ssr:build:client && bun run ssr:build:server && bun run ssr:build:serve
scripts.ssr:serve:dev: cd src/apps/ssr && bun run serve-hmr.ts dev
scripts.ssr:serve:dev-node: bun build src/apps/ssr/serve-hmr.ts --outfile build/ssr/serve-hmr.js --target=node --external vite --define 'IS_BUILT=false' --external "$(pwd)/src/apps/ssr/current-build-info.ts" && SSR_SRC_DIR=$(pwd)/src/apps/ssr node build/ssr/serve-hmr.js dev
scripts.ssr:build-and-serve:dev: bun run ssr:build && bun run ssr:serve:built:dev
scripts.ssr:build-and-serve:prod: bun run ssr:build && bun run ssr:serve:built:prod
